code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let haystack = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let needle = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let target = match string.byte_at(needle, 0)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(haystack)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(haystack, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
